title: News: 2025 Q3
description: 10 questions about major events from July to September 2025

questions.question: Which country held the presidency of the Council of the European Union in the second half of 2025?
questions.explanation: Poland held the rotating presidency of the Council of the EU from July to December 2025.

questions.question: What was the expiration date of Trump's 90-day tariff pause announced in April 2025?
questions.explanation: The 90-day pause on the highest reciprocal tariffs was set to expire in July 2025, creating renewed trade uncertainty.

questions.question: Which major international club football tournament took place in the United States in summer 2025?
questions.explanation: The expanded FIFA Club World Cup, featuring 32 clubs, was held in the United States in summer 2025.

questions.question: Where was the 2025 FIFA Club World Cup held?
questions.explanation: The 2025 FIFA Club World Cup was held in the United States across multiple venues.

questions.question: Which space agency successfully launched the Europa Clipper mission to study Jupiter's moon Europa?
questions.explanation: NASA's Europa Clipper, launched in October 2024, continued its journey toward Jupiter's moon Europa during 2025.

questions.question: What major climate milestone was reported for the 12-month period ending in mid-2025?
options: Global temperatures dropped below the 1.5°C threshold
It was confirmed as the hottest 12-month period on record
Arctic ice reached record high levels
questions.explanation: Global temperatures continued to exceed the 1.5°C warming threshold above pre-industrial levels.

questions.question: Which country's elections in 2025 were closely watched for the rise of far-right parties in Europe?
questions.explanation: Following the February 2025 election, Germany's coalition formation was closely watched amid the strong showing by the far-right AfD party.

questions.question: What AI safety topic dominated tech policy discussions in mid-2025?
questions.explanation: AI-generated deepfakes and their potential impact on democratic processes remained a major policy concern in 2025.

questions.question: Which major tech event typically held in September saw significant AI hardware announcements in 2025?
questions.explanation: Apple's annual September event featured new iPhone models with enhanced AI capabilities.

questions.question: What was a major ongoing humanitarian crisis in 2025?
options: Conflict and humanitarian disaster in Sudan
questions.explanation: Sudan's civil war, which began in April 2023, continued to cause one of the world's worst humanitarian crises through 2025.
